nasb.text: And working together with Him, we also urge you not to receive the grace of God in vain—

esv.text: Working together with him, then, we appeal to you not to receive the grace of God in vain.

cnv.text: 我們這些與　神同工的，也勸你們不要白受　神的恩典。

ccb.text: 身为上帝的同工，我们劝你们不要辜负祂的恩典。

csbs.text: 我们做为神的同工，也恳求你们：不可白受神的恩典。
